Question: What charity project was initiated by Lords Mobile in May 2023, and through which platform should users seek technical assistance for iOS devices?

Starting URL: https://www.igg.com/

Please:
1. Start from the provided root URL
2. Navigate through the website to find the information needed

golden_answer: Protecting the Azure Ocean, iOS users should contact ihelp.lordsmobile@igg.com for support.

agent_trajectory.name: plan
agent_trajectory.value:
## Goal 1: Identify the charity project initiated by Lords Mobile in May 2023
- Path 1.1: Crawl Lords Mobile official website (https://lordsmobile.igg.com/) and navigate to its "News" or "Events" section to locate announcements from May 2023.
  - Success: Extract a specific charity project name, date, and description from an official news article or press release.
- Path 1.2: Perform a web search using query "Lords Mobile charity May 2023" and crawl the most relevant search results (e.g., official game forum, IGG press releases, or gaming news sites).
  - Success: Identify the charity project name and confirm it was initiated by Lords Mobile in May 2023.
- Path 1.3: Explore IGG.com’s press release or news archive by crawling https://www.igg.com/news/ and filtering for May 2023 entries related to Lords Mobile.
  - Success: Find a press release detailing the charity project and its initiation date.

## Goal 2: Determine the platform through which users should seek technical assistance for iOS devices
- Path 2.1: From IGG.com, locate the "Support" or "Help" link (e.g., https://support.igg.com/) and crawl the support portal to find specific guidance for iOS devices.
  - Success: Identify the named platform (e.g., Zendesk, in-game feedback, official forum) and confirm it is the designated channel for iOS technical assistance.
- Path 2.2: Crawl Lords Mobile’s official support page (likely https://support.lordsmobile.igg.com/) and look for explicit instructions for iOS users.
  - Success: Extract the platform name (e.g., "Submit a ticket via Zendesk" or "Contact us through the in-game support option") and verify it is for iOS.
- Path 2.3: Search the web for "Lords Mobile iOS technical support platform" and crawl the resulting official pages (e.g., IGG support FAQ, Lords Mobile wiki).
  - Success: Obtain a clear statement of the platform (e.g., "Please use the in-game support feature" or "Visit our Zendesk help center for iOS issues").

**Note:** All goals will be executed in parallel after the initial crawl of https://www.igg.com/ to gather navigation links. Paths within each goal are sequential. The final answer will combine findings from both goals.
